title: Validation engine primitives for the bracket
description:
The validation-engine capabilities the bracket depends on: declaring bracket types, scoping validation to a container subtree, and making coverage see the whole subtree.

## Background

The deterministic coverage-preview gate needs three engine capabilities that do not exist yet. They are independent and can be built in parallel.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] A ruleset can declare breakable container and bracket types via config, and a declared type passes both graph and write-path validation.
- [ ] `jit validate` can be scoped to a container bracket subtree and returns a deterministic exit code.
- [ ] `label-coverage` credits a criterion satisfied by any issue in the container transitive subtree, not only direct dependencies.
